```

    Identifier     "eraser"
    Driver         "wacom"

    Option         "ForceDevice" "ISDV4"               # Tablet PC ONLY
EndSection

                                                      # /dev/input/event
                                                      # for USB
    Identifier     "cursor"
    Driver         "wacom"
    Option         "Device" "/dev/wacom"          # Change to 
    Option         "Type" "cursor"
    Option         "ForceDevice" "ISDV4"               # Tablet PC ONLY
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
    Identifier     "Generic Monitor"
    HorizSync       28.0 - 51.0
    VertRefresh     43.0 - 60.0
    Option         "DPMS"
EndSection

Section "Device"
    Identifier     "NVIDIA Corporation NV35 [GeForce FX 5900]"
    Driver         "nvidia"
EndSection

Section "Screen"
    Identifier     "Default Screen"
    Device         "NVIDIA Corporation NV35 [GeForce FX 5900]"

    DefaultDepth    24

        Modes      "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"

    EndSubSection

        Modes      "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"
    EndSubSection
EndSection


```

the problem is that i can't change the resolution to 1280*1024 {my screen's native resolution}
i tried to alter the modes in the "screen section" but then the Xserver failed to start....
SO i had to revert back to the originals....

is there anyway i can get higher resolution?](*,) 

thanks in advance,
N.A.

PS: i know the exact  HorizSync, VertRefresh if they are needed

---

### Post by ashrack on 2006-12-20
Add the following line under SCREEN section in XORG.CONF
```
SubSection     "Display"
        Depth       24
        Modes      "1280x1024" "1024x768" "800x600"
    EndSubSection
```
and restart X. If it gives U the error please append it here.
U can find it under 
"/var/log/"
and the name is something starting with X. Unfortunetly I am at school on Win98 PC ATM.

---
